Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class ListInputControlState<S>

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.InputControlState<javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.ListInputControlState<S>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of elements in the list
public class ListInputControlState<S> extends InputControlState<javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
InputControlState for list-based input controls.

  • Property Details

    • value

      the property holding the value of type R, which may be null

  • Constructor Details

    • ListInputControlState

      public ListInputControlState(javafx.beans.property.ListProperty<S> value, Supplier<? extends Collection<S>> dflt, Function<List<S>,Optional<String>> validate)
      Constructs a new ListInputControlState for managing the state of a list-based input control.
      Parameters:
      value - the ListProperty representing the list of values managed by this input control state.
      dflt - a supplier that provides the default value for the list input control.
      validate - a function used to validate the current state of the list. It takes the list as input and returns an Optional<String> containing a validation error message if the list is invalid, or an empty Optional if valid.

  • Method Details

    • setItems

      public void setItems(Collection<S> arg)
      Sets the value of this input control state with the provided SequencedCollection. If the given collection is null, the current value will be cleared. Otherwise, the elements of the provided collection will replace the current value.
      Parameters:
      arg - the SequencedCollection containing the new elements to set, or null to clear the current value

    • setValue

      public void setValue(@Nullable javafx.collections.ObservableList<S> arg)

    • valueProperty

      protected javafx.beans.property.ListProperty<S> valueProperty()
      Description copied from class: InputControlState
      Provides access to the property representing the current value of the input control. The value can be updated or observed for changes.
      Specified by:
      valueProperty in class InputControlState<javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
      Returns:
      the value property

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Description copied from class: InputControlState
      Determines whether the input control's value is considered to be empty.
      Overrides:
      isEmpty in class InputControlState<javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
      Returns:
      true if the input control's value is empty, otherwise false.
